case.title: BECKER S S CO. v. SNYDER

opinion.h1: BECKER S S CO. v. SNYDER, 280 U.S. 543 (1929)
opinion.h2: The BECKER STEAMSHIP COMPANY, petitioner, v. William SNYDER, etc.* No. 334.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Frederick L. Leckie, of Cleveland, Ohio, for petitioner.
Mr. Luther Day, of Cleveland, Ohio, for respondent.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Appeals of the State of Ohio granted.
[Footnote *] For dismissal, see 280 U.S. 615, 50 S. Ct. 152 74 L. Ed. -.
